keyTargets: Execute Hypertrophy B lift session as planned, adhering to specified loads, rep ranges, and RPE/RIR targets.
Monitor SI response closely to the new Chest-supported Row and Soleus Wall-Sit; drop immediately if any discomfort.
Adhere to the 40-minute time cap for the lift session, prioritizing core exercises and dropping the optional chest set if needed.
warnings: SI monitoring is critical for new exercises (Chest-supported Row, Soleus Wall-Sit).
Accutane protocols: No sauna or extreme heat. Watch for prolonged muscle pain, dark urine, or unusual cramping; report immediately.
Triceps pushdown load (42.5 lbs) is to be held until RIR 2 is consistently achieved across all sets.
Running reintroduction remains gated; earliest safe start is ~May 23rd+ conservative.
highlights: Max HR of 191 bpm (rower) was verified on Fri 5/8, anchoring new HR zones.
Rowing-specific Z1 HR cap adjusted to ≤158 bpm, effective immediately, based on successful LT1 decoupling test on Sat 5/9.
3/7 consecutive symptom-free days banked toward Phase B running reintroduction gate.

exercises.name: Lat pulldown, neutral grip
exercises.note: Anchor 125 lbs for set 1, drift to 130 lbs for sets 2-3, back off to 120 lbs for set 4. Target RPE 8, last set to RIR 1.

exercises.name: Chest-supported row (NEW)
exercises.note: 3 sets of 10 reps @ 80 lbs. Target RPE 8. Monitor SI response.

exercises.name: Preacher curl machine
exercises.note: 3 sets of 12 reps @ 50 lbs/arm. Target RPE 8. (Locked at 50 lbs per previous session).

exercises.name: Triceps pushdown (rope)
exercises.note: Hold 42.5 lbs for all 3 sets until clean RIR 2 is achieved consistently.

exercises.name: Seated calf raise
exercises.note: 4 sets of 12-15 reps @ 315 lbs, maintaining RIR 2.

exercises.name: Soleus wall-sit isometric (NEW)
exercises.note: 3 sets of 30–45 seconds. Knee ~80°, push through forefoot. Target RPE 7-8. Monitor SI response.

exercises.name: Optional DB flye or pec deck
exercises.note: 2 sets of 12 reps @ RPE 7. Perform only if time allows and total lift stays within 40-minute cap (prioritize dropping if running long).

phaseGate.detail: 3/7 days logged clean (5/6-5/8). Need 5/9, 5/10, 5/11, 5/12 to be clean to meet this by Tue 5/12.

currentLoads.name: Incline BB (TM)
currentLoads.note: 125 working weight; AMRAP at 4-wk gates to re-set TM (next W4).

currentLoads.name: Lat pulldown
currentLoads.note: Drift to 130 by S2-3, back off S4 to 120.

currentLoads.name: Triceps pushdown
currentLoads.note: Hold 42.5 until clean RIR 2 across all 3 sets. (Failed at 50 previously).

currentLoads.name: Rear-delt fly
currentLoads.note: Will bump to 125 next session (last: 120×15 RIR 1).

currentLoads.name: Soleus wall-sit (NEW)
currentLoads.note: 3×30–45s, knee ~80°, forefoot push, RPE 7-8. Monitor SI.

thisWeek.label: Hypertrophy B (Deferred)
thisWeek.description: Today's lift session, originally scheduled for Sat 5/9, with a focus on lats, side delts, biceps, triceps, abs, calves, and soleus isometrics. New exercises include Chest-supported Row and Soleus Wall-Sit; monitor SI response closely.

thisWeek.label: Rest Day
thisWeek.description: A complete rest day to recover from the weekend's activity. Focus on daily SI prehab and mobility.

thisWeek.label: Threshold Row + Hypertrophy A
thisWeek.description: Threshold row session (Z2, 162–168 bpm), followed by Hypertrophy A circuit focusing on Incline BB, side delts, biceps, triceps, abs, and soleus wall-sits.

thisWeek.label: Z1 Recovery Row
thisWeek.description: A Z1 easy row for active recovery. Focus on nasal breathing and maintaining conversational pace within the updated rowing-specific Z1 HR cap (≤158 bpm).

thisWeek.label: Rest Day
thisWeek.description: A complete rest day focusing on recovery, mobility, and daily SI prehab.

thisWeek.label: Threshold Row
thisWeek.description: Threshold row session (Z2, 162–168 bpm). Maintain target HR and focus on consistent pacing during intervals.

thisWeek.label: Long Z1 Row
thisWeek.description: Long Z1 aerobic row session (65 min). Focus on maintaining a steady, conversational pace and staying within the updated rowing-specific Z1 HR cap (≤158 bpm).

nextWeek.label: Rest + Prehab
nextWeek.description: A full rest day for recovery, mobility, and daily SI prehab.

nextWeek.label: Z1 Easy Row
nextWeek.description: An easy Z1 aerobic row for recovery. Focus on consistent effort and staying within the rowing-specific Z1 HR cap (≤158 bpm).

nextWeek.label: Threshold Row + Hypertrophy A
nextWeek.description: Threshold row session (Z2, 162–168 bpm) followed by Hypertrophy A circuit (Incline BB, side delts, biceps, triceps, abs, soleus wall-sit).

nextWeek.label: Z1 Easy Row
nextWeek.description: An easy Z1 aerobic row for recovery and base building. Focus on nasal breathing and staying within the rowing-specific Z1 HR cap (≤158 bpm).

nextWeek.label: Z1 Easy Row
nextWeek.description: An optional easy Z1 aerobic row. Can be substituted with a rest day if needed for recovery, adhering to the program's flexibility for rest days.

nextWeek.label: Threshold Row
nextWeek.description: Threshold row session (Z2, 162–168 bpm). Focus on maintaining target HR and consistent effort during intervals.

nextWeek.label: First Easy Outdoor Jog + Hypertrophy B
nextWeek.description: A landmark session: the first easy outdoor jog, marking the reintroduction of running (approx 15-20 min continuous, flat surface). Followed by the Hypertrophy B circuit, including seated calf and soleus wall-sits.
